name: hasavh sql agents
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s.agent AS agentCode,
    a.SortCodeName AS agentName
  FROM dbo.Stock s
  INNER JOIN dbo.AccSortNames a
    ON s.agent = a.AccSortCode
  WHERE s.agent IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  *
FROM base
ORDER BY agentCode ASC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY",
  "params": {
    "offset": {offset},
    "pageSize": {limit}
  }
}

name: hasav sql customers
hasav_sql_products
חשבונית מס
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  doc.*,
  calc.totalBeforeDiscount,
  calc.totalAfterDiscount,
  doc.TFtal AS totalPriceAfterTax,
  calc.totalTax,
  (doc.TFtal - doc.TFtalVat) AS totalTaxSimple
FROM dbo.Stock doc
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    baseBeforeDiscount = ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0) + ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0),
    discFactor = CASE
      WHEN ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0)) <= ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0))
      THEN (1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0)
      ELSE (1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0))
    END
) x
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    totalBeforeDiscount = x.baseBeforeDiscount,
    totalAfterDiscount = ROUND(x.baseBeforeDiscount * x.discFactor, 2),
    totalTax = ROUND(ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0) - (x.baseBeforeDiscount * x.discFactor), 2)
) calc
WHERE
  ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND DocumentID = @documentType
  AND AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND (
    @search IS NULL
    OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = ''
    OR DocNumber LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
    OR AccountKey LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
    OR AccountName LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
  )
ORDER BY ValueDate DESC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "offset": "{offset}",
    "pageSize": "{limit}",
    "documentType": 1,
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "search": "{search}"
  }
}

name: hasav sql document items
hasav_sql_purchase_history
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  sm.Quantity,
  sm.Price,
  sm.SupplyQuantity,
  sm.DiscountPrc,
  sm.TFtal,
  s1.DocNumber,
  s1.ValueDate,
  s1.DocumentID,
  s1.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS s2
  ON s1.DocNumber = s2.Reference AND s1.AccountKey = s2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
WHERE
  (s1.DocumentID IN (2,4,1,6))
  AND s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND s1.ValueDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
ORDER BY s1.ValueDate DESC",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "sku": "{sku}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_purchases_by_sku_warehouses
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH wh AS (
  SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS w
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@warehousesCsv,''),''), ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
)
SELECT
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL AS stock,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 2 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS committed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 0 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS ordered
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ITEMKEY, SUM(ITEMWARHBAL) AS ITEMWARHBAL
  FROM dbo.vBalItemWarehouse
  WHERE ITEMKEY = @sku AND WAREHOUSE = '10'
  GROUP BY ITEMKEY
) AS stockData
  ON stockData.ITEMKEY = sm.ItemKey
WHERE
  sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND sm.SupplyQuantity != 0
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM wh) OR s1.WareHouse IN (SELECT w FROM wh))
GROUP BY
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL",
  "params": {
    "sku": "{sku}",
    "warehousesCsv": "{warehousesCsv}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_purchase_delivery
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SM.ItemKey,
  S1.DocNumber,
  SUM(SM.Quantity) AS Quantity,
  S1.DueDate,
  SM.Warehouse,
  SM.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS S1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS S2
  ON S1.DocNumber = S2.Reference AND S1.AccountKey = S2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves SM
  ON S1.ID = SM.StockID
WHERE
  SM.ItemKey = @sku
  AND S1.DocumentID IN (17,38)
  AND SM.SupplyQuantity != 0
  AND SM.Status != '2'
GROUP BY
  S1.DocNumber, S1.DueDate, SM.ItemKey, SM.Warehouse, SM.Status
ORDER BY S1.DueDate DESC",
  "params": {
    "sku": "{sku}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_debits
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  j.Referance, j.TransType, j.ValueDate, j.IssueDate, j.DocumentID, j.SuF,
  m.AccountKey, m.DebitCredit, m.FullMatch,
  A.Balance, A.FullName
FROM dbo.JurnalTrans AS j
JOIN dbo.JurnalTransMoves AS m
  ON j.TransId = m.TransID
JOIN dbo.Accounts AS A
  ON A.AccountKey = m.AccountKey
WHERE
  m.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND A.Balance != 0
  AND j.Referance != ''
  AND j.ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND j.ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
ORDER BY j.ValueDate ASC",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_cartesset_lines
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    JT.TransID,
    JT.BatchNo,
    JT.TransType,
    JT.TransCredID,
    CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) AS ValueDate,
    CAST(JT.DueDate  AS date) AS DueDate,
    JT.Referance,
    JT.Ref2,
    JT.Description,
    JTM.ID,
    JTM.DebitCredit,
    CAST(JTM.suF AS float) AS suF,
    CASE WHEN CAST(JTM.DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN -CAST(JTM.suF AS float) ELSE CAST(JTM.suF AS float) END AS adjSuF
  FROM dbo.JurnalTrans AS JT
  JOIN dbo.JurnalTransMoves AS JTM
    ON JT.TransID = JTM.TransID
  WHERE
    JTM.AccountKey = @userExtId
    AND JT.Status = '1'
    AND (NULLIF(@dateFrom, '') IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) >= TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateFrom, '')))
    AND (NULLIF(@dateTo, '') IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) <= TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateTo, '')))
)
SELECT
  *,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbDeptTtL,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) <> '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbCredTtl,
  SUM(adjSuF) OVER(ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS Balance
FROM base
ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_agent_profile_bundle
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH DateVars AS (
  SELECT
    CONVERT(date, GETDATE()) AS StartOfToday,
    DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(day, 1, CONVERT(date, GETDATE()))) AS EndOfToday,
    DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AS StartOfMonth,
    DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(month, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1))) AS EndOfMonth
),
MonthlyStats AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
    MONTH(ValueDate) AS month,
    YEAR(ValueDate) AS year
  FROM dbo.Stock
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo)
  GROUP BY YEAR(ValueDate), MONTH(ValueDate)
),
TotalsChosenPeriod AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
    COUNT(*) AS totalOrders,
    AVG(TFtalVat) AS averageBasket
  FROM dbo.Stock
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo)
),
TotalsToday AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalToday,
    COUNT(*) AS countToday
  FROM dbo.Stock, DateVars
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN DateVars.StartOfToday AND DateVars.EndOfToday
),
TotalsMonth AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalMonth,
    COUNT(*) AS countMonth
  FROM dbo.Stock, DateVars
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN DateVars.StartOfMonth AND DateVars.EndOfMonth
)
SELECT
  (SELECT * FROM MonthlyStats FOR JSON PATH) AS monthlyStats,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsChosenPeriod FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsChosen,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsToday FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsToday,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsMonth FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsMonth",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_sales_cycles
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthCurrentYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 13 THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthPreviousYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3) THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 AS averageLastThreeMonths
FROM dbo.Stock S
WHERE
  S.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND S.DocumentID IN (6, 11)
  AND S.TFtal IS NOT NULL
  AND DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3, 13)",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_items_sales_cycles
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SM.ItemKey,
  SM.ItemName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthCurrentYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 13 THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthPreviousYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3) THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 AS averageLastThreeMonths
FROM dbo.Stock S
JOIN dbo.StockMoves SM
  ON S.ID = SM.StockID
WHERE
  S.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND S.DocumentID IN (6, 11)
  AND S.Status = 1
  AND DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3, 13)
GROUP BY SM.ItemKey, SM.ItemName",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}
